mapper.select: select count(d.obj_guid) from (select f1.obj_guid from standardize_object f1 inner join standardize_outputobject f3 on f1.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid where UPPER(f1.obj_engname) = UPPER(#{tableId})) d where d.obj_guid not in (select f2.obj_guid from standardize_inputobject f1 inner join standardize_object f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid)

select obj_guid from standardize_object f3 where f3.obj_guid not in (select f2.obj_guid from standardize_inputobject f1 inner join standardize_object f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid) and upper(f3.obj_engname) = upper(#{tableId}) and f3.sys_id = #{sysId}

select d.obj_guid from (select f1.obj_guid from standardize_object f1 left join standardize_outputobject f3 on f1.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid where UPPER(OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId})) d where d.obj_guid not in (select f2.obj_guid from standardize_inputobject f1 inner join standardize_object f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid) and rownum = 1

select d.obj_guid from (select f1.obj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f1 where UPPER(OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{sourceProtocol}) and SYS_ID = #{sourceSystem} and SYS_SOURCE = #{sourceFirm}) d where d.obj_guid not in (select f2.OBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 inner join STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f3 on f2.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid) and rownum = 1
